pollByAwbAndType: SELECT * FROM inotocdb.rl_notification_sent WHERE awb_number = '$1' AND UPPER(message_type) LIKE '$2' ORDER BY date_timestamp DESC
lifecycleTimeline: SELECT message_type, date_timestamp FROM inotocdb.rl_notification_sent WHERE awb_number = '$1' ORDER BY date_timestamp ASC
selectIdByCrewBase: SELECT id FROM inotocdb.flight_crew_base WHERE crewbase = '$1'
selectCrewBaseById: SELECT id FROM inotocdb.flight_crew_base WHERE id = $1
AUDIT_XSDG_MESSAGES: select airline_code,awb_number,awb_origin,awb_destination,parse_successful,parse_exception,insert_success,insert_exception from inotocdb.audit_xsdg_messages where awb_number IN ${awbs}
AUDIT_NTM_MESSAGES: SELECT MESSAGEID,LEG_DATE,LEG_NUMBER,LEG_ORIGIN,LEG_DESTINATION,AIRLINE_CODE,AWB_NUMBER, PARSE_SUCCESSFUL,PARSE_EXCEPTION,INSERT_SUCCESS,INSERT_EXCEPTION, CONT_FLAG,LAST_FLAG,MESSAGE_SEQ,PROCESSED_FLAG,MESSAGE_TEXT FROM INOTOCDB.AUDIT_NTM_MESSAGES WHERE AWB_NUMBER IN ${awbs} ORDER BY to_timestamp(processing_ts_cst , 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') DESC
AUDIT_NTM_MESSAGES_FNA_FMA: SELECT MESSAGEID,LEG_DATE,LEG_NUMBER,LEG_ORIGIN,LEG_DESTINATION,AIRLINE_CODE,AWB_NUMBER, PARSE_SUCCESSFUL,PARSE_EXCEPTION,INSERT_SUCCESS,INSERT_EXCEPTION, CONT_FLAG,LAST_FLAG,MESSAGE_SEQ,PROCESSED_FLAG,MESSAGE_TEXT FROM INOTOCDB.AUDIT_NTM_MESSAGES WHERE MESSAGEID = '${ntm_messageid}' AND AWB_NUMBER = '-'
AUDIT_NTM_MESSAGES_FNA_FMA_FLIGHT: SELECT LEG_DATE,LEG_NUMBER,LEG_ORIGIN,LEG_DESTINATION,AIRLINE_CODE,AWB_NUMBER, PARSE_SUCCESSFUL,PARSE_EXCEPTION,INSERT_SUCCESS,INSERT_EXCEPTION, CONT_FLAG,LAST_FLAG,MESSAGE_SEQ,PROCESSED_FLAG,MESSAGE_TEXT  FROM INOTOCDB.AUDIT_NTM_MESSAGES WHERE LEG_DATE IN ('${date|MM/DD/YYYY|+0}') AND leg_number IN ${flights}
XSDG_SC: SELECT AIRLINECODE,AWBNUMBER,UNID,PROPERSHIPPINGNAME,TECHNICALSHIPPINGNAME,CLASSORDIVISION,SUBRISK,PACKINGGROUP,QUANTITY,WEIGHT,UNIT,PACKINGINSTRUCTION,"AUTHORIZATION",UNIDSHIPPINGINSTRUCTIONS,ACCEPTED,LIMITEDQUANTITY,CARRIEDUNDEREXEMPTION,UNIDSEQUENCE,ALLINONEOVERPACKGROUPID,TOTALWEIGHT,TOTALWEIGHTUNIT,WEIGHTEXEMPT,REPORTEDQUANTITY,AIOBOXCOUNT,HAZARDLABEL,RAMHEIGHTINCHES,RAMHEIGHTCM,AWBORIGIN,AWBDEST,SEQUENCEICARGO,OPBOXCOUNT FROM INOTOCDB.XSDG_SC WHERE AWBNUMBER IN ${awbs}
XSDG_SI: SELECT AIRLINECODE,AWBNUM,SHIPPERNAME,SHIPPERADDRESS1,SHIPPERADDRESS2,CONSIGNEENAME,CONSIGNEEADDRESS1,CONSIGNEEADDRESS2,AWBORIGIN,REMARKS,AGENTID,AGENTFIRSTNAME,AGENTMIDDLENAME,AGENTLASTNAME,AGENTGROUP,CONTACTINFODOM,CONTACTINFODOM_EXT,CONTACTINFOINTL,CONTACTINFOINTL_EXT,SHIPPERCONTACT,AWBDEST,OVERPACKORALLINONE FROM INOTOCDB.XSDG_SI WHERE AWBNUM IN ${awbs} ORDER BY to_timestamp(DATETIMESTAMP_CST, 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') DESC
XSDG_SRN: SELECT * FROM INOTOCDB.XSDG_SRN WHERE AWBNUMBER IN ${awbs}
NTM_SFI: SELECT LEG_DATE,LEG_ORIGIN,LEG_DESTINATION,LEG_NUMBER,AWB_NUMBER,AIRLINE_CODE,MESSAGE_SEQUENCE,ISPPS FROM INOTOCDB.NTM_SFI WHERE AWB_NUMBER IN ${awbs} ORDER BY to_timestamp(DATETIMESTAMP_CST, 'MM/DD/YY HH:MI AM') DESC
NTM_UA: SELECT LEG_ORIGIN,LEG_DESTINATION,LEG_NUMBER,LEG_DATE,AWB_NUMBER,AIRLINE_CODE,UNIT_ASSIGNED,PLAN_TO_FLY_FLAG,PCS_IN_UNIT,PC_WT,UNID,CLASS,PACKINGGROUP,MESSAGE_SEQUENCE,PROPER_SHIPPING_NAME,UNITSEQUENCE,ALLINONEOVERPACKGROUPID,UNIDSEQUENCE,COMMODITYCODE FROM INOTOCDB.NTM_UA WHERE AWB_NUMBER IN ${awbs} ORDER BY to_timestamp(DATETIMESTAMP_CST, 'MM/DD/YY HH:MI AM') DESC
SHIPPERCHECKLIST: SELECT AIRLINECODE,AWBNUMBER,FLIGHTNUMBER,FLIGHTDATE,UNORID,UNID,PROPERSHIPPINGNAME,TECHNICALSHIPPINGNAME,CLASSORDIVISION,SUBRISK,PACKINGGROUP,QUANTITY,WEIGHT,UNIT,PACKINGINSTRUCTION,"AUTHORIZATION",UNIDSHIPPINGINSTRUCTIONS,CHECKLISTREJECTSTRING,CHECKLISTNASTRING,OF12UPDATESUCCESSFUL,OF12UPDATETIMEANDDATE,CHECKLISTTYPE,NUMBEROFRETRIES,REJECTINFORMATIONSTRING,SABRERESPONSESTRING,ACCEPTED,LIMITEDQUANTITY,CARRIEDUNDEREXEMPTION,UNIDSEQUENCE,ALLINONEOVERPACKGROUPID,TOTALWEIGHT,TOTALWEIGHTUNIT,WEIGHTEXEMPT,REPORTEDQUANTITY,AIOBOXCOUNT,HAZARDLABEL,RAMHEIGHTINCHES,RAMHEIGHTCM,OPBOXCOUNT FROM INOTOCDB.SHIPPERCHECKLIST WHERE AWBNUMBER IN ${awbs}
SHIPPERFLIGHTINFORMATION: SELECT AIRLINECODE,AWBNUM,FLIGHTDATE,FLIGHTNUMBER,LEGFLTNUM,LEGFLTDATE,LEGORIGIN,LEGDESTINATION,LEGSEQUENCE,CARRIERCODE,UNIBUS_SPLIT_NUMBER,UALOCK,UALOCKID,UALOCKNAME,BALOCK,BALOCKID,BALOCKNAME,UALOCKTIMESTAMP,BALOCKTIMESTAMP,REBOOKEDFLAG,REBOOKINGINDEX,USEXPRESSLEGFLTNUMBER FROM INOTOCDB.SHIPPERFLIGHTINFORMATION WHERE AWBNUM IN ${awbs}
SHIPPERINFORMATION: SELECT AIRLINECODE,AWBNUM,FLIGHTNUMBER,FLIGHTDATE,SHIPPERNAME,SHIPPERADDRESS1,SHIPPERADDRESS2,CONSIGNEENAME,CONSIGNEEADDRESS1,CONSIGNEEADDRESS2,AWBORIGIN,REMARKS,ISPPS,AIRCRAFTTYPE,USG13,LITHIUMBATTERY,OVERPACKORALLINONE,FOUNDINHUB,LOSFROMHUB,TOTALWEIGHTFROMHUB,TOTALPCSFROMHUB,UNITFROMHUB,AGENTID,AGENTFIRSTNAME,AGENTMIDDLENAME,AGENTLASTNAME,AGENTGROUP,SOURCEIP,CONTACTINFODOM,CONTACTINFODOM_EXT,CONTACTINFOINTL,CONTACTINFOINTL_EXT,AEFLAG,DELETEFLAG,UPDATEFLAG,DELETETIMESTAMP,UPDATETIMESTAMP,DELETED_ID_NAME_GROUP,UPDATED_ID_NAME_GROUP,DELETEDREASON,UPDATEDREASON,SHIPPERCONTACT FROM INOTOCDB.SHIPPERINFORMATION WHERE AWBNUM IN ${awbs}
UNITASSIGN: SELECT AWBNUM,AIRLINECODE,FLIGHTDATE,FLIGHTNUMBER,LEGFLTDATE,LEGFLTNUMBER,LEGORIGIN,LEGDESTINATION,AWBDESTINATION,UNITASSIGNED,PIECESINUNIT,TOTALPCS,TOTALWEIGHT,DISPLAYEDUNIT,DISPLAYEDCLASSDIV,UNIDSEQUENCE,SPLITFLAG,UPDATEDDATE,UPDATEDBY,UPDATEDNAME,UNITSTATUS,UNITSEQUENCE,SPECIALHANDLINGINSTRUCTIONS,DISPLAYEDPACKINGGROUP,ISFLIGHTUNITFLAG,NOTOCDISPLAYSORT,ALLINONEOVERPACKGROUPID,WEIGHTEXEMPT,REBOOKEDFLAG,AIOBOXCOUNT,OPBOXCOUNT FROM INOTOCDB.UNITASSIGN WHERE AWBNUM IN ${awbs}
RL_NOTIFICATION_SENT: SELECT LEG_NUMBER,LEG_DATE,LEG_ORIGIN,LEG_DESTINATION,MESSAGE_TYPE,AWB_NUMBER,AIRLINE_CODE FROM INOTOCDB.RL_NOTIFICATION_SENT WHERE AWB_NUMBER IN ${awbs}
EDIT_CHANGE_HISTORY: SELECT AWB_NUMBER,AIRLINE_CODE,FLIGHT_NUMBER,FLIGHT_DATE,EDITED_BY_ID,EDIT_REQUESTED_BY_ID,CHANGEID,CHANGE_DESCRIPTION,EDIT_REASON FROM INOTOCDB.EDIT_CHANGE_HISTORY WHERE AWB_NUMBER IN ${awbs}
FLIGHT_STATUS: SELECT * FROM INOTOCDB.FLIGHT_STATUS WHERE FLIGHT_NUMBER = '${flightNumber}' AND LEG_DATE = '${flightDate}'
FLIGHT_CACHE: SELECT * FROM INOTOCDB.FLIGHT_CACHE WHERE FC_LEG_FLTNUMBER = '${flightNumber}' AND FC_LEG_FLTDATE = '${flightDate}'
AWBS_COUNT: SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNTS FROM INOTOCDB.AUDIT_NTM_MESSAGES WHERE AWB_NUMBER = '${awb}' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNTS FROM INOTOCDB.AUDIT_XSDG_MESSAGES WHERE AWB_NUMBER = '${awb}'
BINASSIGN: SELECT awbnum,airlinecode,flightdate,flightnumber,legfltdate,legfltnumber,legorigin,legdestination,awbdestination,unid,classordiv,pkggroupramcat,quantity,weight,piecesinunit,unitassigned,unidsequence,isunitsplitflag,binupdatedtimestamp,bininstimestamp,binupdatedbyid,binupdatedname,binstatus,binsequence,piecesinbin,specialhandlinginstructions,isflightunitflag,notocdisplaysort,binlocation,allinoneoverpackgroupid,unitofmeasure,weightexempt,rebookedflag,aioboxcount,binenteredby,enteredbycomments,height,opboxcount FROM INOTOCDB.BINASSIGN b  WHERE b.AWBNUM IN ${awbs}
ERR_UNITASSIGN_BY_FLIGHT: SELECT AWBNUM,AIRLINECODE,FLIGHTDATE,FLIGHTNUMBER,LEGFLTDATE,LEGFLTNUMBER,LEGORIGIN,LEGDESTINATION,AWBDESTINATION,UNITASSIGNED,PIECESINUNIT,TOTALPCS,TOTALWEIGHT,DISPLAYEDUNIT,DISPLAYEDCLASSDIV,UNIDSEQUENCE,SPLITFLAG,UNITSTATUS,UNITSEQUENCE,SPECIALHANDLINGINSTRUCTIONS,DISPLAYEDPACKINGGROUP,ISFLIGHTUNITFLAG,ALLINONEOVERPACKGROUPID,WEIGHTEXEMPT FROM INOTOCDB.UNITASSIGN WHERE LEGFLTNUMBER = '${flightNumber}' AND LEGFLTDATE = '${flightDate}' AND LEGORIGIN = '${origin}' AND LEGDESTINATION = '${destination}'
ERR_SHIPPERINFO_BY_FLIGHT: SELECT AIRLINECODE,AWBNUM,FLIGHTNUMBER,FLIGHTDATE,SHIPPERNAME,SHIPPERADDRESS1,SHIPPERADDRESS2,CONSIGNEENAME,CONSIGNEEADDRESS1,CONSIGNEEADDRESS2,AWBORIGIN,REMARKS,ISPPS,AGENTID,AGENTFIRSTNAME,AGENTMIDDLENAME,AGENTLASTNAME,AGENTGROUP,CONTACTINFODOM,CONTACTINFODOM_EXT,CONTACTINFOINTL,CONTACTINFOINTL_EXT,SHIPPERCONTACT FROM INOTOCDB.SHIPPERINFORMATION WHERE FLIGHTNUMBER = '${flightNumber}' AND FLIGHTDATE = '${flightDate}'
ERR_XSDG_SC_BY_FLIGHT: SELECT AIRLINECODE,AWBNUMBER,UNID,PROPERSHIPPINGNAME,TECHNICALSHIPPINGNAME,CLASSORDIVISION,SUBRISK,PACKINGGROUP,QUANTITY,WEIGHT,UNIT,PACKINGINSTRUCTION,ACCEPTED,LIMITEDQUANTITY,CARRIEDUNDEREXEMPTION,UNIDSEQUENCE,ALLINONEOVERPACKGROUPID,TOTALWEIGHT,TOTALWEIGHTUNIT,WEIGHTEXEMPT,REPORTEDQUANTITY,HAZARDLABEL,RAMHEIGHTINCHES,RAMHEIGHTCM,AWBORIGIN,AWBDEST FROM INOTOCDB.XSDG_SC WHERE AWBNUMBER IN (SELECT DISTINCT AWBNUM FROM INOTOCDB.UNITASSIGN WHERE LEGFLTNUMBER = '${flightNumber}' AND LEGFLTDATE = '${flightDate}' AND LEGORIGIN = '${origin}' AND LEGDESTINATION = '${destination}')
ERR_BINASSIGN_BY_FLIGHT: SELECT awbnum,airlinecode,flightdate,flightnumber,legfltdate,legfltnumber,legorigin,legdestination,binlocation,unitassigned,piecesinunit,binstatus FROM INOTOCDB.BINASSIGN WHERE legfltnumber = '${flightNumber}' AND legfltdate = '${flightDate}' AND legorigin = '${origin}' AND legdestination = '${destination}'
ERR_SFI_BY_FLIGHT: SELECT LEG_DATE,LEG_ORIGIN,LEG_DESTINATION,LEG_NUMBER,AWB_NUMBER,AIRLINE_CODE FROM INOTOCDB.NTM_SFI WHERE LEG_NUMBER = '${flightNumber}' AND LEG_DATE = '${flightDate}' AND LEG_ORIGIN = '${origin}' AND LEG_DESTINATION = '${destination}'
